search_queries_used: site:dha.gov.ae child ear pain otitis guideline
site:who.int acute otitis media children guideline
site:nice.org.uk acute otitis media recommendations children
candidate_sources_rejected: WHO Pocket Book of Hospital Care for Children ear-problem section
rejection_reasons: The WHO pocket book is a broader hospital manual and was not selected over the current diagnosis-specific NICE guideline.
The NHS earache page is public information rather than clinician workflow guidance.
population_applicability: Partial: exact source covers children and young people with acute otitis media, while the baseline includes undifferentiated ear pain and other causes.
setting_applicability: Partial: the source is an England health-service guideline and the baseline is setting-agnostic.
UAE_applicability: No direct UAE applicability is established; this international source requires UAE clinician review before application.
recency_verification: Official NICE NG91 recommendations page opened on 2026-07-11; it states publication 2018-03-28 and last update 2022-03-11.
superseded_check: Current official NICE page checked on 2026-07-11; no newer issue than the stated 2022 update was identified.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped acute-otitis-media terminology, course, otorrhoea, worsening, and reassessment documentation.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Defines the pediatric acute-otitis-media population, usual duration, reassessment triggers, otorrhoea context, and serious-illness review.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped systemic-illness and mastoiditis concern prompts and clinician-documented escalation.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Requires review for rapid worsening or systemic illness and identifies severe infection and acute complications including mastoiditis for hospital assessment.

unresolved_source_gaps: No exact UAE clinician guideline for undifferentiated pediatric ear pain was identified.
External-ear, trauma, foreign-body, hearing, detailed otoscopy, and broad ear-pain content is not fully covered by the acute-otitis-media source.
Medication and antibiotic choices remain unsupported clinician-entered content.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.

legacy_item_support_mappings.direct_relationship: The exact NICE section supports these acute-otitis-media terms and course items without covering every cause of ear pain.
